notes: Capabilities describe the .rpp file-parse pathway only.
The .rpp format knowledge is community/SDK documented (COMMUNITY_DOCUMENTED), not an official file-format specification.
validation_status=TESTED means the field is exercised by this repo's test suite against REAPER 7 fixtures, including the lossless round-trip gate.

provenance.explanation: Role inferred from the track name 'Vocal Main' by keyword matching; heuristic metadata, not DAW ground truth.
A REAPER folder parent is a summing bus: children with their parent send enabled (MAINSEND) mix into the parent channel. Documented REAPER behaviour, not a stored field.
